claims.summary: Preserve muffled density and viscosity as primary felt evidence rather than reducing them to a health label.
Verify cohesion index and cohesion-to-motion ratio distinguish shape holding from stagnant drag without controller authority.
Observe high-entropy alignment and viscosity transitions using existing telemetry without applying control.
Any live fluctuation, viscosity, damping, PI, or regulation-policy change remains Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
